fa-cog.appearanceId: single gear wheel with teeth around the circumference and a circular center hole; toothed wheel shape with evenly spaced radial notches and a hollow core
fa-cog.functionalityId: opens application settings or configuration panel; adjusts system or feature preferences
fa-cog.intentId: configure or customize how the application behaves; access settings to change a feature

fa-cogs.appearanceId: two interlocking gear wheels of different sizes with teeth meshing together; overlapping toothed cogs arranged side by side with offset notches
fa-cogs.functionalityId: opens advanced system configuration or multi-component settings; manages interconnected processes or automation rules
fa-cogs.intentId: configure complex system interactions or workflow automation; adjust multiple linked settings at once

fa-coin.appearanceId: circular disc shape representing a coin with a raised rim and a centered design element; flat round token outline with an embossed or lined interior
fa-coin.functionalityId: displays a currency amount or token balance; triggers a payment or in-app currency transaction
fa-coin.intentId: view or spend a coin or token balance; make a purchase or exchange using in-app currency

fa-coin-blank.appearanceId: plain circular disc with a raised outer rim and no interior design elements; smooth flat round token shape with an empty center surface
fa-coin-blank.functionalityId: represents an unassigned or placeholder currency token; inserts a blank coin entry into a currency or reward system
fa-coin-blank.intentId: add a custom or undefined coin type to a list; create a placeholder for a new currency item

fa-coin-front.appearanceId: circular coin shape viewed face-on with a portrait profile or center motif and a beaded or ridged rim; round disc showing a frontal embossed figure within a detailed border
fa-coin-front.functionalityId: displays the face value or front side of a coin denomination; toggles to the obverse view of a coin in a catalog or collection
fa-coin-front.intentId: inspect the front face of a coin in a collection or catalog; view denomination details of a specific coin

fa-coin-vertical.appearanceId: coin disc shown edge-on or tilted at an angle revealing its thickness as a narrow elliptical shape; round coin viewed from the side showing a thin vertical profile
fa-coin-vertical.functionalityId: represents a coin standing upright or displayed in edge view; toggles an isometric or tilted coin orientation in a UI
fa-coin-vertical.intentId: view the edge or thickness of a coin in a display; show a coin from an alternate three-dimensional perspective

fa-coins.appearanceId: stacked pile of multiple circular coin discs overlapping or layered on top of each other; group of round tokens arranged in a cluster or column
fa-coins.functionalityId: displays a total currency balance or coin count; navigates to a wallet, earnings, or financial summary screen
fa-coins.intentId: check total coin or currency balance; access financial or reward summary information

fa-colon.appearanceId: two vertically aligned small dots or circles stacked one above the other; a pair of filled circular points arranged in a vertical column
fa-colon.functionalityId: inserts a colon punctuation character into a text field; marks a separator between label and value in a form
fa-colon.intentId: add a colon separator in typed content; format text with a label-value delimiter

fa-colon-sign.appearanceId: currency symbol consisting of a letter C or curved glyph with one or two vertical lines crossing through it; stylized colon monetary sign with a vertical stroke overlay
fa-colon-sign.functionalityId: inserts or displays the Costa Rican colon currency symbol; labels a price or financial value in colones
fa-colon-sign.intentId: show a monetary value in Costa Rican colones; format a currency field with the colon sign

fa-columns.appearanceId: two vertical rectangular panels placed side by side with a narrow gap between them; dual-column layout with equal-width vertical blocks
fa-columns.functionalityId: toggles a two-column layout for a content area; splits the view into parallel vertical sections
fa-columns.intentId: arrange content into a two-column display; compare two sections of information side by side

fa-columns-3.appearanceId: three vertical rectangular panels arranged side by side with equal spacing; triple-column layout with three parallel vertical blocks
fa-columns-3.functionalityId: toggles a three-column grid layout for a page or panel; splits content into three parallel vertical sections
fa-columns-3.intentId: organize content into a three-column display; view multiple content streams in a grid arrangement

fa-comet.appearanceId: elongated streak shape with a rounded head tapering into a long trailing tail pointing diagonally; meteor or shooting-star silhouette with a glowing nucleus and a fanning wake
fa-comet.functionalityId: represents a fast-moving or transient notification or event; triggers an animation or highlights a rapidly changing item
fa-comet.intentId: draw attention to a fast-moving or high-priority event; mark an item as trending or rapidly updated

fa-comma.appearanceId: small curved glyph with a short tail curling downward below a rounded body; typographic comma mark with a teardrop head and a downward hook
fa-comma.functionalityId: inserts a comma punctuation character into a text field; separates list items or decimal values in a formatted input
fa-comma.intentId: add a comma separator in written content; format a list or numeric value with proper punctuation

fa-command.appearanceId: square outline with looped rounded corners forming four outward-curving loops at each corner; four-cornered rounded square frame with circular corner extensions
fa-command.functionalityId: represents a keyboard command shortcut or modifier key; triggers a command palette or keyboard shortcut overlay
fa-command.intentId: access keyboard command shortcuts or the command palette; execute a quick action via a keyboard modifier key

fa-comment.appearanceId: rounded rectangular speech bubble with a small triangular tail pointing downward from one bottom corner; chat bubble outline with a pointed callout at the lower left
fa-comment.functionalityId: opens a comment thread or message input field; creates a new comment or annotation on an item
fa-comment.intentId: leave a comment or message on a post or document; start a conversation thread on a selected item

fa-comment-arrow-down.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a downward-pointing arrow in its center; chat bubble shape with an interior chevron or arrow pointing toward the bottom
fa-comment-arrow-down.functionalityId: scrolls down to a comment or loads earlier messages in a thread; downloads or exports a comment or message
fa-comment-arrow-down.intentId: navigate to older comments or scroll through a message thread; retrieve or save a comment to a local destination

fa-comment-arrow-up.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing an upward-pointing arrow in its center; chat bubble shape with an interior chevron or arrow pointing toward the top
fa-comment-arrow-up.functionalityId: scrolls up to a newer comment or submits a reply upward in a thread; uploads or sends a message to a channel
fa-comment-arrow-up.intentId: navigate to the top of a comment thread or submit a reply; send content or a message to an upstream destination

fa-comment-arrow-up-right.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a diagonal arrow pointing toward the upper-right corner; chat bubble shape with an interior arrow angled up and to the right
fa-comment-arrow-up-right.functionalityId: shares or forwards a comment to an external destination; redirects a message or reply to another user or platform
fa-comment-arrow-up-right.intentId: share a comment or message with someone outside the thread; forward a reply to a different channel or recipient

fa-comment-captions.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing two or three short horizontal text lines representing captions; chat bubble shape with stacked narrow bars suggesting subtitle or caption text
fa-comment-captions.functionalityId: adds or toggles captions or subtitles within a comment or media element; enables transcription display inside a message bubble
fa-comment-captions.intentId: view or add captions to a comment or media post; enable subtitle or accessibility text within a message

fa-comment-check.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a checkmark or tick mark inside; chat bubble shape with an interior V-shaped check symbol
fa-comment-check.functionalityId: marks a comment as resolved or approved; confirms that a message or feedback item has been addressed
fa-comment-check.intentId: indicate that a comment or issue has been resolved; confirm acknowledgment of a message or feedback

fa-comment-code.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing angled less-than and greater-than bracket symbols representing code; chat bubble shape with interior left and right chevron brackets
fa-comment-code.functionalityId: inserts a code snippet into a comment or opens a code-focused chat view; displays inline code within a message thread
fa-comment-code.intentId: share or view a code snippet within a comment; communicate technical content in a code-formatted message

fa-comment-dollar.appearanceId: speech bubble outline with a dollar sign or currency symbol centered inside; chat bubble shape containing a vertical S-stroke with one or two horizontal bars
fa-comment-dollar.functionalityId: opens a payment, billing, or financial chat thread; sends a monetary request or payment note in a message
fa-comment-dollar.intentId: discuss pricing or payment details within a conversation; send or request a payment through a messaging interface

fa-comment-exclamation.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing an exclamation mark with a vertical bar and a dot below; chat bubble shape with an interior alert or warning symbol
fa-comment-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a comment as urgent or alerts the user to an important message; marks a conversation as requiring immediate attention
fa-comment-exclamation.intentId: highlight an urgent or critical comment in a thread; notify others of an important message that needs action

fa-comment-heart.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a heart shape at its center; chat bubble with an interior double-lobed cardiac symbol
fa-comment-heart.functionalityId: likes or reacts to a comment with a heart or love reaction; sends a supportive or affectionate message
fa-comment-heart.intentId: express appreciation or affection toward a comment; react positively to a message or post

fa-comment-image.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a small landscape or photo thumbnail with a mountain and sun shape; chat bubble with an interior mini image or picture placeholder
fa-comment-image.functionalityId: attaches or displays an image within a comment or message; opens a media viewer for a photo shared in a chat
fa-comment-image.intentId: share or view an image inside a comment thread; send a photo or visual media through a messaging interface

fa-comment-lines.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing two or three horizontal lines representing text content; chat bubble shape with stacked interior bars suggesting lines of written text
fa-comment-lines.functionalityId: opens a detailed text comment or multiline note; displays the full body of a message or annotation
fa-comment-lines.intentId: read or write a detailed multiline comment; view the full text content of a message

fa-comment-medical.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a medical cross or plus symbol at its center; chat bubble shape with an interior cross formed by a vertical and horizontal bar
fa-comment-medical.functionalityId: opens a medical consultation chat or health-related message thread; sends a clinical note or healthcare communication
fa-comment-medical.intentId: access medical advice or healthcare communication in a chat; start or view a health-related conversation thread

fa-comment-middle.appearanceId: speech bubble outline with the tail or pointer positioned at the center of the bottom edge rather than at a corner; symmetrically centered callout bubble pointing straight down
fa-comment-middle.functionalityId: displays a tooltip or contextual comment anchored to the middle of an element; positions a message callout at a central reference point
fa-comment-middle.intentId: show a centered tooltip or comment relative to a UI element; attach a note that points to the middle of a target

fa-comment-middle-top.appearanceId: speech bubble outline with the callout tail emerging from the center of the top edge pointing upward; rounded rectangular bubble with a centered upward-pointing triangular notch at the top
fa-comment-middle-top.functionalityId: displays a tooltip or annotation anchored above and centered over a UI element; positions a callout pointing upward from a midpoint
fa-comment-middle-top.intentId: show a centered tooltip appearing above a target element; attach an upward-pointing comment to a reference point

fa-comment-minus.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a horizontal minus or dash symbol at its center; chat bubble shape with an interior single horizontal bar
fa-comment-minus.functionalityId: removes a comment or reduces the reply count; hides or collapses a message within a thread
fa-comment-minus.intentId: delete or suppress a comment in a discussion; reduce or hide a message from a thread

fa-comment-music.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a musical note or eighth-note symbol inside; chat bubble shape with an interior single stemmed note or double-note glyph
fa-comment-music.functionalityId: shares a music track or audio clip within a message; opens a music-related conversation or playlist chat
fa-comment-music.intentId: send or discuss music content within a chat thread; share a song or audio recommendation through messaging

fa-comment-nodes.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing two or more small circles connected by lines representing a network node diagram; chat bubble with an interior dot-and-line graph structure
fa-comment-nodes.functionalityId: opens a comment thread related to a node-based workflow or graph structure; links a message to a specific node or connection point
fa-comment-nodes.intentId: discuss or annotate a node in a workflow diagram; communicate about a specific connection in a graph or network

fa-comment-pen.appearanceId: speech bubble outline with a small pen or pencil shape overlaid at one corner; chat bubble combined with a diagonal writing instrument symbol
fa-comment-pen.functionalityId: edits an existing comment or opens a comment for text modification; activates an inline writing or annotation mode
fa-comment-pen.intentId: modify or revise a posted comment; annotate or write a note directly within a message

fa-comment-plus.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a plus or cross symbol at its center; chat bubble shape with an interior crosshair formed by a vertical and horizontal bar
fa-comment-plus.functionalityId: adds a new comment or reply to a thread; creates an additional annotation on a document or post
fa-comment-plus.intentId: post a new comment or start a reply in a conversation; add an annotation to a shared document

fa-comment-question.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a question mark with a curved top and a dot below; chat bubble shape with an interior query or inquiry symbol
fa-comment-question.functionalityId: opens a help or FAQ chat thread; marks a comment as a question requiring an answer
fa-comment-question.intentId: ask a question or seek clarification in a conversation; flag a message as an open inquiry needing a response

fa-comment-quote.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a pair of small curved quotation marks or typographic guillemets; chat bubble shape with two interior curled comma-like quote symbols
fa-comment-quote.functionalityId: inserts a quoted reply or block quote into a comment; marks a message as a quotation from another source
fa-comment-quote.intentId: cite or quote another message within a reply; attribute a statement to its original source in a discussion

fa-comment-slash.appearanceId: speech bubble outline with a diagonal slash line crossing through it; chat bubble shape overlaid with a forward-diagonal bar indicating negation
fa-comment-slash.functionalityId: mutes or disables comments on a post or item; turns off a message notification or blocks a chat thread
fa-comment-slash.intentId: silence or disable comments for a post or item; prevent further messages from appearing in a thread

fa-comment-smile.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing a simple smiley face with two dot eyes and a curved upward mouth; chat bubble shape with an interior circular emoticon expression
fa-comment-smile.functionalityId: adds an emoji or emoticon reaction to a comment; opens an emoji picker within a message input
fa-comment-smile.intentId: express positive emotion or add a fun reaction to a message; insert an emoji into a chat or comment

fa-comment-text.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing two or three short horizontal lines representing written words; chat bubble shape with interior stacked text-line bars
fa-comment-text.functionalityId: opens or displays a text-based comment or message; shows the written content inside a comment thread
fa-comment-text.intentId: read or compose a text comment in a discussion; view the written body of a message or annotation

fa-comment-times.appearanceId: speech bubble outline containing an X or times symbol at its center; chat bubble shape with two crossed diagonal bars forming an interior delete mark
fa-comment-times.functionalityId: deletes or dismisses a comment or message; closes or removes a chat thread from view
fa-comment-times.intentId: remove or discard a comment from a discussion; close a chat window or delete a posted message

fa-commenting.appearanceId: rounded speech bubble with horizontal text lines inside and a tail at the bottom corner, often rendered with emphasis marks suggesting active typing; chat bubble combined with interior text rows indicating live conversation
fa-commenting.functionalityId: indicates active commenting or triggers a live comment feed; opens a real-time discussion or annotation panel
fa-commenting.intentId: participate in an active discussion or comment thread; engage with a live conversation on a post or document

fa-comments.appearanceId: two overlapping speech bubbles of different sizes stacked or offset behind each other; a larger foreground chat bubble and a smaller background bubble indicating a conversation
fa-comments.functionalityId: opens a group conversation or multi-user chat thread; navigates to a comments section with multiple replies
fa-comments.intentId: view or participate in a multi-person discussion; access a comment section with multiple replies

fa-comments-dollar.appearanceId: two overlapping speech bubbles with a dollar sign visible inside the foreground bubble; dual chat bubble arrangement containing a currency S-stroke symbol
fa-comments-dollar.functionalityId: opens a financial discussion thread or money-related chat; sends or reviews payment-linked messages
fa-comments-dollar.intentId: discuss pricing, billing, or financial matters in a group conversation; access a money-related messaging thread

fa-comments-question.appearanceId: two overlapping speech bubbles with a question mark visible inside the foreground bubble; dual chat bubble arrangement containing a query symbol with a curved top and dot
fa-comments-question.functionalityId: opens a Q&A or help discussion thread; marks a multi-person chat as containing an open question
fa-comments-question.intentId: ask a question in a group chat or discussion forum; access a help or FAQ conversation thread

fa-comments-question-check.appearanceId: two overlapping speech bubbles with a question mark and a checkmark visible together inside the foreground bubble; dual chat bubble arrangement containing both a query glyph and a tick symbol
fa-comments-question-check.functionalityId: marks a group discussion question as answered or resolved; confirms that an inquiry in a multi-person thread has been addressed
fa-comments-question-check.intentId: indicate that a group question has been answered; close or resolve an open inquiry in a discussion thread

fa-compact-disc.appearanceId: flat circular disc with a small center hole and concentric ring lines radiating outward; round CD or DVD shape with a reflective ring pattern and a centered spindle hole
fa-compact-disc.functionalityId: represents optical media or a music album; opens a disc-based media player or audio album view
fa-compact-disc.intentId: access or play music from a CD or disc-based album; browse optical media content in a player

fa-compass.appearanceId: circular dial with cardinal direction markers and a rotating needle or pointer bisecting the circle; round compass rose with N-S-E-W labels and a central directional arrow
fa-compass.functionalityId: opens a map, navigation, or location-finding feature; orients the user within a directional or geographic interface
fa-compass.intentId: navigate to a destination or find current orientation; explore a map or directional feature

fa-compass-drafting.appearanceId: drafting compass tool with two pointed legs joined at a pivot hinge at the top, used for drawing circles; V-shaped mechanical drawing instrument with a pointed stylus and a pivot joint
fa-compass-drafting.functionalityId: activates a circle-drawing or precision geometry tool; opens a drafting or CAD measurement feature
fa-compass-drafting.intentId: draw a precise circle or arc in a design tool; use a geometric drafting feature for technical illustration
